title: macOS app: codesign + notarise in build script
description: macos-menubar/build-app.sh does bare swift build + manual plist copy with no signing. Cannot distribute SweechBar to other Macs.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 4: "Build script does codesigning + notarisation for distribution"

acceptanceCriteria: build-app.sh accepts --release flag that codesigns with a Developer ID
Notarisation uses xcrun notarytool with credentials from keychain profile name (no plaintext secrets)
Dev build path (no --release) stays as-is — no signing required for personal use
